title: Prepare animals for parturition
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Prepare animals for parturition demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Identify and provide animal nutritional needs

pcs.text: Identify and confirm nutritional needs of pregnant animals according to feeding plan

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement procedures to minimise feed wastage and spillage, and dispose and recycle feed waste.

pcs.text: Identify potential hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to address risks and biosecurity hazards

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify potential hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to address risks and biosecurity hazards.
